economic_notes: GBEs include Des Nedhe Development LP, Des Nedhe Investments LP, Des Nedhe Management Inc, English River Enterprises Equipment Rental LP, English River Enterprises Inc, English River Enterprises LP No.1, English River Enterprises Property Management LP, Tron Construction & Mining LP, Tron Industrial Services LP. Industries: Investment Holding & Management, Mining Services, Retail & Commercial Management. Mining Services segment recorded a loss of $2,788,383 for their year ended Dec 31 2022.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023. Province is Saskatchewan (SK). Three entities consolidated: English River-Patuanak, English River-La Plonge, English River CMHC Housing Program. Nine GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. GBEs use December 31 year-end. New PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligation standard adopted April 1, 2022 prospectively, resulting in $648,000 ARO liability and $767,000 increase in TCA. New PS 3450 Financial Instruments also adopted April 1, 2022. English River Community Benefits Trust and Treaty Land Entitlement Trust excluded from consolidation. Long-term debt figure of 2,927,682 includes current portion ($298,000) and long-term portion ($2,629,682). Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($17,640,757) + Meadow Lake Health & Social Development Authority ($3,284,301) + MLTC Program Services ($3,439,937) + MLTC Child & Family Services ($792,327) + CMHC ($289,569) + Northern Lights School Division ($196,096) + Government of Saskatchewan ($201,766) + GST Rebates ($35,600) = approximately $25,880,353; however only clearly government sources included. osr calculated as total revenue minus clearly identified government transfers. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided text.
